title: Falling Plugin
description: A Plugin that lets you trip if you take fall damage chance 50/50
body:
# 🏃‍♂️ Falling Plugin - Trip or Fall? 🤔  

Welcome to **Falling Plugin**, a fun and simple Minecraft plugin that adds a **50% chance of tripping** when you take fall damage! Will you gracefully slide into a trip 🛏️ or just take the hit? 💥  

## 🌟 Features  
✅ **50% chance to start tripping** when you hit the ground!  
✅ **Prevents movement while tripping** for a more immersive effect.  
✅ **Automatically restores normal movement** after 1 second.  
✅ **Lightweight & optimized** for performance.  
✅ **Works on Minecraft 1.14+** 🏗️  

## 🎮 How It Works  
1️⃣ Take **fall damage** from any height.  
2️⃣ The plugin flips a **virtual coin** 🪙 (50/50 chance).  
3️⃣ **Heads?** You **trip** for 1 second before standing back up. 🏊‍♂️  
4️⃣ **Tails?** You just **fall normally**. 💀  

## ⚙️ Installation  
1️⃣ **Download** the latest `.jar` file from the release tab.
2️⃣ Place it in your `plugins/` folder.  
3️⃣ **Restart** your server.  
4️⃣ Enjoy the chaos! 🎉  

## 🔧 Configuration  
No configuration needed—just **drop & play**!  

## ❓ FAQ  
❔ **Does this work with other movement plugins?**  
✔️ Yes! It should work fine unless another plugin directly modifies tripping.  

❔ **Can I change the trip chance?**  
⚙️ Not yet, but a config option might be added soon!  

## 📥 Download  
🔽 Grab the latest version from:  
📦 **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/falling-plugin)**
